description: CompositionPurple knitted woollen scarf, with horizontal ribs and ribbed hemlineWash careonly hand wash using a mild detergentDo not bleachHang dryDo not ironCelebrate your lifestyle with this scullers scarf and the choices that come with it. Wrap it around your neck and let it hang loose on your torso on a windy day. Or, simply wear it like a muffler tucked into your coat on a wintery day.
